title: Machu Picchu — South Wall Stonework
description: High-fidelity photographic documentation of the south wall Inca stonework dating to the 15th century. The site faces accelerated erosion from increased tourist traffic and changing rainfall patterns in the Cusco region. This record establishes a baseline for long-term deterioration monitoring.

title: Angkor Wat — 4K Conservation Survey
description: 4K documentary footage of the current state of preservation efforts at Angkor Wat. 14 distinct architectural zones were identified. The site faces threats from groundwater depletion causing structural subsidence across the western causeway.

title: Petra Treasury — LiDAR Point Cloud
description: High-density LiDAR scan of the Al-Khazneh facade capturing sub-millimetre surface detail. 50,000 points per square metre enables precise monitoring of sandstone erosion over time. Flash flooding events are accelerating surface loss at the base.

title: Great Wall — Jiankou Section 3D Scan
description: Photogrammetric 3D scan of the unrestored Jiankou section of the Great Wall. Over 30% of battlements have collapsed since 2010. The high-resolution mesh supports remote assessment and restoration planning without disturbing the fragile structure.

title: Colosseum — Structural Survey 2026
description: Comprehensive structural survey identifying areas of the Colosseum requiring immediate restoration. Documents micro-crack propagation in the north facade caused by urban vibration from metro construction. Includes 3D displacement mapping.

title: Palmyra — Temple of Bel Ruins
description: Post-2015 photographic record of remaining Temple of Bel ruins. Critical baseline for future reconstruction following deliberate destruction. Image recognition identified 12 surviving architectural elements across the site.

title: Stonehenge — Aerial Photogrammetry Survey
description: Complete aerial photogrammetric survey of the Stonehenge complex. The model captures subsurface earthwork features invisible from ground level. Annual comparison surveys monitor frost heave and ground settlement affecting standing stones.

title: Acropolis of Athens — Conservation Documentary
description: 4K documentary tracking active conservation work on the Parthenon eastern colonnade over 6 months. Azure Video Indexer detected 22 scenes and generated full subtitle transcripts in English and Greek.

title: Chichen Itza — El Castillo LiDAR Survey
description: Full-site LiDAR survey revealing previously unmapped structures beneath the jungle canopy surrounding El Castillo pyramid. Ground-penetrating capability identifies buried architectural features without excavation.

title: Taj Mahal — Facade Condition Report
description: Detailed condition survey of the main Taj Mahal facade documenting yellowing of white marble caused by airborne pollutants. The report proposes targeted cleaning interventions and pollution source mapping.

title: Easter Island — Moai Statues Photographic Survey
description: Systematic photographic survey of all 1,000+ Moai statues on Rapa Nui. Catalogues surface erosion caused by coastal salt spray and invasive vegetation. Several statues have lost over 40mm of surface detail since 1990 baseline photographs.

title: Lascaux Caves — Palaeolithic Art Documentation
description: Multispectral imaging documentation of the 17,000-year-old cave paintings at Lascaux. The cave has been closed to the public since 1963 due to fungal damage caused by visitor CO₂. This record captures 915 distinct animal figures using infrared and ultraviolet imaging.

title: Pompeii — Street of Abundance 3D Scan
description: High-resolution 3D scan of the Via dell'Abbondanza, Pompeii's main commercial street. The model captures intact shop facades, painted election notices, and wheel ruts. Used by the Pompeii Archaeological Park to plan drainage improvements without destructive survey.

title: Alhambra — Nasrid Geometric Tilework Survey
description: Close-range photogrammetric survey of the Nasrid Palace tilework and carved plasterwork in the Court of the Lions. Documents 34 distinct geometric pattern types dating from the 14th century. Water ingress from the roof terrace is dissolving adhesive beneath 12% of tiles.

title: Abu Simbel — Temples Full LiDAR Survey
description: Complete LiDAR survey of both temples at Abu Simbel, originally carved into the mountainside under Ramesses II around 1264 BCE. The survey benchmarks ongoing micro-displacement caused by Lake Nasser water table fluctuations since the 1968 relocation.

title: Hagia Sophia — Architectural Heritage Documentary
description: 4K documentary examining the architectural evolution of Hagia Sophia from its 537 CE Byzantine construction through Ottoman modifications to the present day. Azure Video Indexer identified 31 distinct architectural features and generated multilingual subtitles.

title: Borobudur — Full Temple 3D Scan
description: Complete photogrammetric scan of the Borobudur temple complex — the world's largest Buddhist monument. The 9th-century structure contains 2,672 relief panels. Scan data is used to plan preventive conservation against volcanic ash and groundwater seepage.

title: Timbuktu — Manuscript Digitisation Archive
description: High-resolution digitisation of 12,000 manuscripts from Timbuktu's Ahmed Baba Institute. The collection includes 14th–17th century texts on astronomy, medicine, and law. Physical manuscripts face severe humidity damage; 23% show active fungal deterioration.

title: Mesa Verde — Cliff Palace 3D Scan
description: Comprehensive 3D scan of the 700-year-old Cliff Palace, the largest cliff dwelling in North America. The 150-room structure is experiencing mortar loss on 18% of external walls due to freeze-thaw cycles and increasing drought stress on the structural sandstone.

title: Luxor Temple — Night Aerial Survey
description: Aerial thermal imaging and 4K night survey of Luxor Temple revealing previously undocumented subsurface features beneath the Avenue of Sphinxes. Thermal anomalies indicate buried chambers in three locations currently under investigation.

title: Bagan Temples — Drone Photographic Archive
description: Aerial photographic archive of 2,200 surviving temples and pagodas on the Bagan plain. The 2016 earthquake damaged 361 structures. This multi-temporal archive enables damage assessment comparison and tracks the quality of ongoing restoration works.

title: Pompeii — Herculaneum Gate LiDAR
description: Precision LiDAR scan of the Herculaneum Gate and northern necropolis at Pompeii. Sub-5mm accuracy enables the detection of active stone spalling not visible to the naked eye. Data feeds directly into the park's predictive maintenance scheduling system.

title: Sigiriya — Rock Fortress Condition Report
description: Condition assessment of the 5th-century Sigiriya rock fortress including the frescoes in the mirror wall gallery. Documents ongoing salt crystallisation damage to the fresco plaster and proposes micro-climate controls for the cave shelter.

title: Tiwanaku — Akapana Pyramid LiDAR
description: LiDAR survey of the Akapana pyramid and surrounding ceremonial complex at Tiwanaku, capital of the pre-Columbian Tiwanaku Empire. Reveals the full extent of the original pyramid plan, 60% of which has been robbed for building stone since colonial times.

title: Mont-Saint-Michel — Tidal Island 4K Survey
description: 4K aerial and ground-level survey of Mont-Saint-Michel documenting the abbey, ramparts, and tidal causeway. Azure Video Indexer identified 28 architectural zones. The survey documents saltwater dampness rising 3m above medieval tide levels due to sea-level change.
